summary: Comprehensive testing of GPI Document Hub - Sales Dashboard / Orders Awaiting Review. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed via Playwright.

console_warnings.message: In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact - React dev mode warning only

passed_tests: GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue - returns items with status, customer info, external_doc_no, amount, warnings, blocking_issues
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue - item structure includes all required fields (id, file_name, document_type, status, customer_name, etc.)
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue?status=needs_review - filters to only needs_review items
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue?status=already_created - filters to only already_created items
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue?has_bc_order=no - filters to docs without BC order
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue?has_bc_order=yes - filters to docs with BC order
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue?search=<term> - searches by customer/PO/filename
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue - pagination with skip/limit works
GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue?sort=created_desc - sorting works
GET /api/sales-dashboard/summary - returns fast summary counts (ready, ready_warnings, needs_review, already_created, total)
GET /api/sales-dashboard/summary - counts match queue summary counts
Data integrity: 6 sales-eligible documents exist (1 needs_review, 5 already_created)
Already created items have bc_record_no field
Needs review items have blocking_issues field
Frontend: Sales Orders page renders at /sales-orders with summary cards
Frontend: Summary cards show correct counts (Ready: 0, With Warnings: 0, Needs Review: 1, Already Created: 5)
Frontend: Clicking a summary card filters the table by that status
Frontend: Queue table shows Status badge, Customer, PO/Ext Doc, File, Amount, Lines, Date, Info, Action columns
Frontend: Already Created rows show SO number badge (e.g., SO 107040) in Info column
Frontend: Needs Review rows show warning text (Customer not resolved) in Info column
Frontend: Review/View button navigates to /documents/{id}
Frontend: Search input present and functional
Frontend: Status filter dropdown works
Frontend: Sales Orders nav item appears in sidebar with ShoppingCart icon
seed_data_creation: Used existing sales-eligible documents (6 total: 5 already_created with BC sales orders, 1 needs_review)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Dashboard testing complete. Key endpoints: GET /api/sales-dashboard/queue returns items with lightweight readiness assessment, GET /api/sales-dashboard/summary returns fast counts. Test data includes 6 sales-eligible documents - Bragg Live Food Products (SO 107040), Gamer Packaging Inc (SO 107039), NEW (SO 107038), and test documents. The _assess_readiness function computes status based on bc_sales_order presence and field completeness. Email service is MOCKED.

queue_endpoint.returns: items array with status, customer_no, customer_name, external_doc_no, amount, warnings, blocking_issues, bc_record_no

summary_endpoint.returns: counts for ready, ready_warnings, needs_review, already_created, total

frontend.summary_cards: 4 clickable cards showing counts for Ready, With Warnings, Needs Review, Already Created
frontend.filters: Search input (400ms debounce), status dropdown, BC status dropdown, sort dropdown, clear filters button
frontend.queue_table: 9 columns: Status, Customer, PO/Ext Doc, File, Amount, Lines, Date, Info, Action
frontend.info_column: Shows BC SO number badge for created items, warning text for needs_review items
frontend.navigation: Sidebar nav item, Review/View buttons navigate to /documents/{id}
